ddls:
CREATE TABLE "accidents" (
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accident */,
  "crash_date" TEXT /* Date of the accident */,
  "crash_time" TEXT /* Time of the accident */,
  "borough" TEXT /* Borough where the accident occurred */,
  "zip_code" INTEGER /* ZIP code of the accident location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the accident */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the accident */,
  "location" TEXT /* Formatted location information */,
  "on_street_name" TEXT /* Street where the accident occurred */,
  "off_street_name" TEXT /* Street where the vehicle was coming from */,
  "cross_street_name" TEXT /* Cross street involved in the accident */,
  "number_of_persons_injured" INTEGER /* Number of persons injured in the accident */,
  "number_of_persons_killed" INTEGER /* Number of persons killed in the accident */,
  "number_of_pedestrians_injured" INTEGER /* Number of pedestrians injured in the accident */,
  "number_of_pedestrians_killed" INTEGER /* Number of pedestrians killed in the accident */,
  "number_of_cyclist_injured" INTEGER /* Number of cyclists injured in the accident */,
  "number_of_cyclist_killed" INTEGER /* Number of cyclists killed in the accident */,
  "number_of_motorist_injured" INTEGER /* Number of motorists injured in the accident */,
  "number_of_motorist_killed" INTEGER /* Number of motorists killed in the accident */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions at the time of the accident */,
  "light_conditions" TEXT /* Light conditions at the time of the accident */,
  "road_surface_conditions" TEXT /* Road surface conditions at the time of the accident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("accident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle involved in an accident */,
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accident the vehicle is associated with */,
  "vehicle_type_code" TEXT /* Type of the vehicle (e.g., Sedan, SUV, Motorcycle) */,
  "contributing_factor" TEXT /* Contributing factor for the vehicle involved in the accident */,
  "vehicle_registration_number" TEXT /* Registration number of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_year" INTEGER /* Year of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_accident_id FOREIGN KEY ("accident_id") REFERENCES accidents ("accident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver involved in an accident */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle driven by the driver */,
  "driver_name" TEXT /* Name of the driver */,
  "driver_age" INTEGER /* Age of the driver */,
  "driver_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the driver */,
  "driver_license_number" TEXT /* License number of the driver */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drivers_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pedestrians" (
  "pedestrian_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pedestrian involved in an accident */,
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accident the pedestrian is associated with */,
  "pedestrian_age" INTEGER /* Age of the pedestrian */,
  "pedestrian_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the pedestrian */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pedestrian_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pedestrians_accident_id FOREIGN KEY ("accident_id") REFERENCES accidents ("accident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cyclists" (
  "cyclist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cyclist involved in an accident */,
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accident the cyclist is associated with */,
  "cyclist_age" INTEGER /* Age of the cyclist */,
  "cyclist_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the cyclist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cyclist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cyclists_accident_id FOREIGN KEY ("accident_id") REFERENCES accidents ("accident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "boroughs" (
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each borough */,
  "borough_name" TEXT /* Name of the borough */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "zip_codes" (
  "zip_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ZIP code */,
  "zip_code" INTEGER /* ZIP code */,
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the borough the ZIP code is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zip_code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_zip_codes_borough_id FOREIGN KEY ("borough_id") REFERENCES boroughs ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "formatted_location" TEXT /* Formatted string representing the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury record */,
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accident the injuries are associated with */,
  "injured_persons" INTEGER /* Total number of persons injured */,
  "killed_persons" INTEGER /* Total number of persons killed */,
  "injured_pedestrians" INTEGER /* Number of pedestrians injured */,
  "killed_pedestrians" INTEGER /* Number of pedestrians killed */,
  "injured_cyclists" INTEGER /* Number of cyclists injured */,
  "killed_cyclists" INTEGER /* Number of cyclists killed */,
  "injured_motorists" INTEGER /* Number of motorists injured */,
  "killed_motorists" INTEGER /* Number of motorists killed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_accident_id FOREIGN KEY ("accident_id") REFERENCES accidents ("accident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "timeframes" (
  "timeframe_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each timeframe record */,
  "crash_date" TEXT /* Date of the accident */,
  "crash_time" TEXT /* Time of the accident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("timeframe_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_timeframes_crash_date FOREIGN KEY ("crash_date") REFERENCES accidents ("crash_date")
)

CREATE TABLE "contributing_factors" (
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contributing factor */,
  "factor_description" TEXT /* Description of the contributing factor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle type */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* Description of the vehicle type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, transportation engineer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the record */,
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accident being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the analysis method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the analysis method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interventions" (
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intervention */,
  "intervention_description" TEXT /* Description of the intervention */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report that triggered the intervention */,
  "target_borough" TEXT /* Borough targeted for the intervention */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interventions_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "helmet_usage" (
  "helmet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each helmet usage record */,
  "cyclist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cyclist wearing the helmet */,
  "helmet_worn" INTEGER /* Whether a helmet was worn by the cyclist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("helmet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_helmet_usage_cyclist_id FOREIGN KEY ("cyclist_id") REFERENCES cyclists ("cyclist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airbag_deployment" (
  "airbag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airbag deployment record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle involved */,
  "airbag_deployed" INTEGER /* Whether the airbag deployed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airbag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_airbag_deployment_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "street_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each street condition record */,
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accident associated with the street condition */,
  "street_surface_type" TEXT /* Type of street surface */,
  "road_markings" TEXT /* Type of road markings */,
  "street_lighting" TEXT /* Type of street lighting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_street_conditions_accident_id FOREIGN KEY ("accident_id") REFERENCES accidents ("accident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_signals" (
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic signal record */,
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accident associated with the traffic signal */,
  "signal_type" TEXT /* Type of traffic signal */,
  "signal_status" TEXT /* Status of the traffic signal at the time of the accident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_signals_accident_id FOREIGN KEY ("accident_id") REFERENCES accidents ("accident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_conditions" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather condition record */,
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accident associated with the weather condition */,
  "weather_type" TEXT /* Type of weather */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at the time of the accident */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity at the time of the accident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_conditions_accident_id FOREIGN KEY ("accident_id") REFERENCES accidents ("accident_id")
)
